▸ TC-4.5c-16 Dual-Death Placeholder Loop on Display Device E2EAC3 P0 SKIP
Dual-Death Placeholder Loop on Display Device
Priority: P0 · Level: E2E · AC: AC3 · handover

Precondition

  • Engine sandbox supports dual session kill (active + preloaded simultaneously)
  • DB Seed: Create Live + start broadcasting · active + preloaded session both ready
  • backend dual-death detection พร้อม (within 5s · NFR-REL-03) + Owner console เปิดอยู่

Test Steps

  1. [DB Seed] Create Live + start broadcasting
  2. [Engine] Active engine session + preloaded session both ready
  3. [Engine] Sandbox configured to kill BOTH simultaneously at T=10:00
  4. [Time] T=10:00 · trigger dual engine failure
  5. [Backend] Within 5s · TAKRA backend detects dual death (NFR-REL-03)
  6. [Browser] ASSERT: Display Device shows "เดี๋ยวกลับมา" placeholder overlay
  7. [Browser] ASSERT: Placeholder = branded loop/static (not black/error)
  8. [Audio] ASSERT: Audio = silence OR ambient music (no Avatar voice)
  9. [SSE] alert.high pushed to Owner console
  10. [Browser] ASSERT: Owner sees critical banner: "Engine unavailable"
  11. [State] Live state machine → Interrupted
  12. [Cleanup] Manual recovery available (Stop + Restart)

Test Data

  • Engine sandbox supports dual session kill
  • Dual kill at T=10:00
  • Duration: ~40s

Expected Result

  • Within 5s · backend detects dual death (NFR-REL-03)
  • Display Device shows "เดี๋ยวกลับมา" placeholder overlay (branded loop/static · not black/error)
  • Audio = silence OR ambient music (no Avatar voice)
  • alert.high pushed to Owner console + critical banner "Engine unavailable"
  • Live state machine → Interrupted · manual recovery available
  • Closes Full-Loop visual proof for AC3 third-tier fallback

Priority: P0 · Level: API · AC: AC1 · **Endpoint:** GET /live/{id}/health-check · health-check

  • user login เป็น Owner ของ WS_A และมี JWT พร้อมใช้งาน

  2. ยิง `GET /api/v1/live/{id}/health-check`

  • Status: 200 (check executed · just reports fail)

▸ TC-4.8-05 Health Fail Blocks Live Start APIAC2 · **Endpoint:** POST /live/start P0 SKIP
Health Fail Blocks Live Start
Priority: P0 · Level: API · AC: AC2 · **Endpoint:** POST /live/start · health-check

Precondition

  • user login เป็น Owner ของ WS_A และมี JWT พร้อมใช้งาน
  • health check ของ Live นี้ return `{ ok: false, reason: "quota" }` (TTS quota exhausted)

Test Steps

  2. Owner ยิง `POST /api/v1/live/start`
  3. ตรวจ pre-flight gate

Test Data

  • Pre-condition: health check returns `{ ok: false, reason: "quota" }`

Expected Result

  • Status: 412 Precondition Failed
  • Body: `{ type: "...health-check-failed", reason: "quota", remedy: "..." }`
  • Live state ไม่เปลี่ยน
  • Engine adapter ไม่ถูกเรียก
  • UI แสดง remedy ให้ Owner

  1. ยิง `GET /api/v1/live/{id}/health-check`

  • terminal state Live

▸ TC-4.8-07 Liveness ≠ Readiness IntAC3 P0 SKIP
Liveness ≠ Readiness
Priority: P0 · Level: Int · AC: AC3 · health-check

Precondition

  • apply migrations ครบ + Real Postgres test container พร้อม
  • Engine process alive · ตอบ `/liveness` 200
  • Engine อยู่ใน degraded state (alive แต่ WebRTC track หยุดส่ง · not broadcasting)

Test Steps

  1. Engine process alive · ตอบ `/liveness` 200
  2. WebRTC track stops sending (engine internal failure)
  3. Health Check should detect readiness issue (not just liveness)

Test Data

  • Engine in degraded state (alive but not broadcasting)

Expected Result

  • Liveness check: ok (process alive)
  • Readiness check: fail (WebRTC track inactive)
  • Health Check returns `{ ok: false, reason: 'readiness' }`
  • Distinguishes from process-dead scenario

▸ TC-4.1-01 Owner Starts Live → 200 + Broadcast URL APIAC1 · **Endpoint:** POST /live/start P0 SKIP
Owner Starts Live → 200 + Broadcast URL
Priority: P0 · Level: API · AC: AC1 · **Endpoint:** POST /live/start · launch-live

Precondition

  • user login เป็น Owner ของ WS_A และมี JWT พร้อมใช้งาน
  • Live entity `live_test_001` state=`Confirmed` (pre-flight passed) อยู่ใน WS_A
  • Engine adapter mocked เพื่อ return fixture handover.json

Test Steps

  1. ยิง `POST /api/v1/live/start` พร้อม `{ liveId }` ใต้ context ของ Owner WS_A
  2. ตรวจ response status + body shape
  3. ตรวจ Live state transition (DB) + engine adapter ถูกเรียก 1 ครั้ง

Test Data

  • `Authorization: Bearer ${ownerToken}` (role = Owner)
  • `X-Acting-Workspace: WS_A_ID`
  • Body: `{ liveId: "live_test_001" }` (Live entity state=`Confirmed` · pre-flight passed)
  • Engine adapter mocked เพื่อ return fixture handover.json

Expected Result

  • Status: 200
  • Body shape: `{ broadcastUrl: string, token: string, ttl: 7200 }`
  • `broadcastUrl` match regex `/https:\/\/engine\.takra\.[a-z]+\/broadcast\/[a-z0-9-]+/`
  • JWT signature ของ token verifiable
  • Live state transitions to `Live` ใน DB
  • `live_session_state` row created
  • Latency ≤ 2 วินาที (NFR-001)

Actual Result

— บันทึกผลตอนทดสอบ —

Status

PASS FAIL HOLD BLOCKED SKIP
▸ TC-4.1-03-api Pre-flight Not Passed → 409 APIAC1 · **Endpoint:** POST /live/start P1 SKIP
Pre-flight Not Passed → 409
Priority: P1 · Level: API · AC: AC1 · **Endpoint:** POST /live/start · launch-live

Precondition

  • user login เป็น Owner ของ WS_A และมี JWT พร้อมใช้งาน
  • Seed Live ใน state `Draft` (pre-flight ยังไม่ผ่าน · ขาด scripts)

Test Steps

  1. Seed Live ใน state `Draft` (pre-flight ยังไม่ผ่าน · ขาด scripts)
  2. ยิง `POST /api/v1/live/start`
  3. ตรวจ response + side effects

Test Data

  • Live state = `Draft`
  • Owner JWT + WS_A_ID header

Expected Result

  • Status: 409 Conflict
  • Body: `{ type: "...pre-flight-not-passed", reason: "missing-scripts" | "no-products" | ... }`
  • Live state ยังเป็น `Draft` (ไม่เปลี่ยน)
  • Engine adapter ไม่ถูกเรียก (no side effect)

▸ TC-4.1-12 Non-Member Workspace → 403 APIDoD · **Endpoint:** POST /live/start P0 SKIP
Non-Member Workspace → 403
Priority: P0 · Level: API · AC: DoD · **Endpoint:** POST /live/start · launch-live

Precondition

  • มี 2 workspaces WS_A / WS_B (multi-tenant fixture)
  • Seed Live live_001 ใน WS_A
  • User Bob เป็น member ของ WS_B เท่านั้น (ไม่ใช่ member WS_A)

Test Steps

  1. Seed Live live_001 ใน WS_A
  2. User Bob (member WS_B only) ส่ง request โดยใส่ `X-Acting-Workspace: WS_A_ID`
  3. ตรวจ deny + audit log

Test Data

  • `Authorization: Bearer ${bobToken}` (Bob = WS_B member only)
  • `X-Acting-Workspace: WS_A_ID`
  • Body: `{ liveId: "live_001" }`

Expected Result

  • Status: 403 problem+json
  • Body `type` มี string "forbidden"
  • Live state unchanged
  • Audit log บันทึก 403 attempt (actor=Bob · workspace=WS_A)
  • Engine adapter ไม่ถูกเรียก

▸ TC-4.1-13 Real Launch → Real Render End-to-End E2EAC1 (full happy path) P0 SKIP
Real Launch → Real Render End-to-End
Priority: P0 · Level: E2E · AC: AC1 (full happy path) · launch-live

Precondition

  • Real Avatar Engine sandbox endpoint พร้อม (Cat 3.11 contract published)
  • WebRTC test environment พร้อม (Caddy + valid TLS) + 2 browser contexts (Owner console + Display Device)
  • DB Seed: Create Live (avatar/voice/scripts) + pre-flight pass
  • user = Owner ของ workspace + login สำเร็จ

Test Steps

  1. [DB Seed] Create Live (avatar/voice/scripts) + pre-flight pass
  2. [Browser] Owner navigate /live/studio/{id}
  3. [Browser] Click Start
  4. [API] POST /live/start → real engine warmup (~60s wait)
  5. [Browser] Walkthrough modal appears (3 steps)
  6. [Browser] Copy broadcast_url
  7. [Browser] Open Display Device URL in new context (page2)
  8. [Engine] Real Engine streams via WebRTC
  9. [Browser] ASSERT: `<video>` element receives stream (videoWidth > 0)
  10. [Browser] ASSERT: avatar visible (screenshot diff > 5% from black baseline)
  11. [Browser] Owner console shows state=Live + SSE events flowing
  12. [Browser] Banner "การตอบคอมเมนต์ยังไม่เปิด" visible (AC2)
  13. [Cleanup] Stop Live · drain engine session

Test Data

  • Live (avatar/voice/scripts) · pre-flight passed
  • Real engine sandbox + 2 browser contexts
  • Duration: ~90s

Expected Result

  • `<video>` element receives stream (videoWidth > 0)
  • avatar visible (screenshot diff > 5% from black baseline)
  • Owner console shows state=Live + SSE events flowing
  • Banner "การตอบคอมเมนต์ยังไม่เปิด" visible (AC2)
  • End-to-end happy path สำเร็จ · catches integration breaks
  • ---
  • > **Total:** 1 Full-Loop TC (P0×1) · script: `apps/web/tests/smoke/full-loop/launch-live-4-1-13-full.smoke.mjs`

  • ---

  • Owner JWT token

  • Zod parse success (no SchemaError thrown)
  • Service returns `{ broadcastUrl, token, ttl: 7200 }`
  • Mock engine called exactly 1 ครั้ง (no retry path)

Priority: P1 · Level: UI · AC: AC1 · launch-live

Precondition

  • user login เป็น Owner และเปิดหน้า `/live/studio/{id}` ได้
  • Live state = Confirmed (pre-flight passed)
  • Mock route `**/live/start` → fulfill ด้วย valid `{ broadcastUrl, token, ttl: 7200 }`

Test Steps

  1. Mock engine response — POST /live/start → 200 + valid `{ broadcastUrl, token, ttl: 7200 }`
  2. Owner navigate `/live/studio/{id}`
  3. Click "Start" button
  4. ตรวจ modal + steps + progress

Test Data

  • Live state = Confirmed (pre-flight passed)
  • Mock route `**/live/start` → fulfill with valid response
  • Selector: `[data-testid="walkthrough-modal"]`

Expected Result

  • Modal visible ภายใน 200ms หลังคลิก
  • 3 steps แสดงตามลำดับ:
  • Step 1: "เปิด URL บน Display Device" + broadcast URL copy button
  • Step 2: "เปิด TikTok Live บน Phone"
  • Step 3: "จ่อ Camera ที่ Display Device"
  • Progress indicator แสดง step ปัจจุบัน
  • ข้าม step ไม่ได้ (sequential)
  • Copy URL button ใช้งานได้

Actual Result

— บันทึกผลตอนทดสอบ —

Status

PASS FAIL HOLD BLOCKED SKIP

Priority: P1 · Level: UI · AC: AC1 · launch-live

  • user login เป็น Owner และเปิดหน้า `/live/studio/{id}` ได้
  • Live state = `Draft` (pre-flight missing scripts)
  • Pre-flight check returns `{ ok: false, reason: "missing-scripts" }`

  2. Owner navigate `/live/studio/{id}`
  3. ตรวจ Start button state + hint

Test Data

  • Live state = Draft
  • Pre-flight check returns `{ ok: false, reason: "missing-scripts" }`

Expected Result

  • Start button มี attribute `disabled`
  • `aria-disabled="true"` ตั้งถูก
  • Tooltip/hint แสดง "Pre-flight ไม่ผ่าน · ดูเหตุผลที่ Wizard Step 4"
  • axe-core scan: 0 a11y violations
  • คลิก disabled button → ไม่มี effect

▸ TC-4.6-01 Pause Live APIAC1 · **Endpoint:** POST /live/{id}/pause P0 SKIP
Pause Live
Priority: P0 · Level: API · AC: AC1 · **Endpoint:** POST /live/{id}/pause · live-controls

Precondition

  • user login เป็น Owner ของ WS_A และมี JWT พร้อมใช้งาน
  • Live ใน state `Live` พร้อม orchestrator ทำงานอยู่

Test Steps

  1. Live ใน state `Live` พร้อม orchestrator ทำงานอยู่
  2. ยิง `POST /api/v1/live/{id}/pause`
  3. ตรวจ state machine + orchestrator suspended

Test Data

  • liveId · Owner JWT + WS_A_ID
  • Live current state = `Live`

Expected Result

  • Status: 200
  • Body: `{ state: "Paused", pausedAt: <ISO> }`
  • Orchestrator suspended (no new script_started events)
  • SSE pushes `state.changed` event
  • Engine session ไม่ถูก close (resume ได้)

Actual Result

— บันทึกผลตอนทดสอบ —

Status

PASS FAIL HOLD BLOCKED SKIP
▸ TC-4.6-02 Resume Live APIAC1 · **Endpoint:** POST /live/{id}/resume P0 SKIP
Resume Live
Priority: P0 · Level: API · AC: AC1 · **Endpoint:** POST /live/{id}/resume · live-controls

Precondition

  • user login เป็น Owner ของ WS_A และมี JWT พร้อมใช้งาน
  • Live ใน state `Paused` · cursor อยู่ที่ตำแหน่งล่าสุด

Test Steps

  1. Live ใน state `Paused`
  2. ยิง `POST /api/v1/live/{id}/resume`
  3. ตรวจ resume from cursor

Test Data

  • liveId · state=Paused · cursor at last position

Expected Result

  • Status: 200
  • Body: `{ state: "Live", resumedFromCursor: { scene, script } }`
  • Orchestrator resumes from saved cursor
  • SSE pushes `state.changed`
  • No script duplicate playback

— บันทึกผลตอนทดสอบ —

Stop Live
Priority: P0 · Level: API · AC: AC1 · **Endpoint:** POST /live/{id}/stop · live-controls

  • user login เป็น Owner ของ WS_A และมี JWT พร้อมใช้งาน
  • Live ใน state `Live` หรือ `Paused`

Test Steps

  2. ยิง `POST /api/v1/live/{id}/stop`
  3. ตรวจ drain + completion

Test Data

  • liveId · current state Live/Paused

Expected Result

  • Status: 200
  • Body: `{ state: "Completed", completedAt: <ISO> }`
  • Orchestrator drains (finish current script then stop)
  • Engine session closed gracefully
  • `live_session_state` final write persisted

▸ TC-4.6-04 Invalid State Transition → 409 APIAC1 · **Endpoint:** POST /live/{id}/pause P1 SKIP
Invalid State Transition → 409
Priority: P1 · Level: API · AC: AC1 · **Endpoint:** POST /live/{id}/pause · live-controls

Precondition

  • user login เป็น Owner ของ WS_A และมี JWT พร้อมใช้งาน
  • Live ถูก stop แล้ว → state = `Completed`

Test Steps

  1. Stop Live → state = Completed
  2. ยิง `POST /api/v1/live/{id}/pause` (invalid · Completed → Paused ไม่ allowed)

Test Data

  • liveId · state=Completed

Expected Result

  • Status: 409 Conflict
  • Body `type`: "invalid-state-transition"
  • Body include `currentState: "Completed"`, `attemptedAction: "pause"`
  • State unchanged

Actual Result

— บันทึกผลตอนทดสอบ —

▸ TC-4.6-09 Non-Member SSE Subscribe → 403 APIDoD · **Endpoint:** GET /live/{id}/sse P0 SKIP
Non-Member SSE Subscribe → 403
Priority: P0 · Level: API · AC: DoD · **Endpoint:** GET /live/{id}/sse · live-controls

Precondition

  • มี 2 workspaces WS_A / WS_B (multi-tenant fixture)
  • มี Live id ใน WS_A
  • User Bob เป็น member ของ WS_B เท่านั้น

Test Steps

  1. User Bob (member WS_B) ยิง `GET /api/v1/live/{id}/sse` โดย id ของ WS_A
  2. ตรวจ deny

Test Data

  • Bob JWT + `X-Acting-Workspace: WS_A_ID` (cross-tenant attempt)

Expected Result

  • Status: 403 problem+json
  • SSE channel ไม่ถูกเปิด
  • Bob ไม่ได้รับ event ใดๆ ของ Live WS_A
  • Audit log records attempt

▸ TC-4.6-13 Real SSE with Orchestrator Events E2EAC2 P1 SKIP
Real SSE with Orchestrator Events
Priority: P1 · Level: E2E · AC: AC2 · live-controls

Precondition

  • Real engine + real SSE channel พร้อม
  • DB Seed: Create Live + start broadcasting (real engine)
  • Owner console เปิดอยู่ + SSE connected

Test Steps

  1. [DB Seed] Create Live + start broadcasting (real engine)
  2. [Browser] Owner console open + SSE connected
  3. [Engine] Orchestrator emits events: script_started · script_ended · scene_switched · handover-required (if cap approached) · preload-ready
  4. [Browser] ASSERT: SSE delivers ALL events to console
  5. [Browser] ASSERT: Console UI updates per event (current script index/title · scene number on scene_switched · queue depth real-time · avatar status icon speaking/idle)
  6. [Time] Wait 30s · ASSERT: Heartbeat received (ECH #44)
  7. [Browser] ASSERT: event_id sequential (1, 2, 3, ...)
  8. [Browser] ASSERT: No event missed during 30s observation
  9. [Cleanup] Stop Live + close SSE

Test Data

  • Real engine + real SSE channel
  • Orchestrator events: script_started · script_ended · scene_switched · handover-required · preload-ready
  • Duration: ~30s

Expected Result

  • SSE delivers ALL events to console
  • Console UI updates per event (script index/title · scene number · queue depth · avatar status)
  • Heartbeat received after 30s (ECH #44)
  • event_id sequential (1, 2, 3, ...)
  • No event missed during 30s observation
  • ---
  • > **Total:** 1 Full-Loop TC (P1×1) · script: `apps/web/tests/smoke/full-loop/live-sse-events-4-6-13-full.smoke.mjs`

Heartbeat 30s (ECH #44)
Priority: P0 · Level: Int · AC: AC2 · live-controls

Precondition

  • apply migrations ครบ + Real Postgres test container พร้อม
  • Open SSE connection (idle · no orchestrator activity)
  • heartbeat config = 30s · ALB idle timeout ≥240s

Test Steps

  1. Open SSE connection
  2. Wait 30s without any orchestrator event
  3. Verify heartbeat received

Test Data

  • Idle SSE connection · no orchestrator activity

Expected Result

  • Heartbeat event ส่งทุก 30s ตรงเวลา (±2s)
  • ALB idle timeout (≥240s) maintained
  • Connection ไม่ถูก drop

▸ TC-4.6-09 Workspace-Scoped SSE IntDoD P0 SKIP
Workspace-Scoped SSE
Priority: P0 · Level: Int · AC: DoD · live-controls

Precondition

  • apply migrations ครบ + RLS enabled บน Real Postgres
  • มี 2 workspaces WS_A / WS_B (multi-tenant fixture) · แต่ละ ws มี live (live_A / live_B)
  • มี 2 separate SSE connections (WS_A owner + WS_B owner)

Test Steps

  1. WS_A owner subscribes to live_A SSE channel
  2. WS_B owner subscribes to live_B SSE channel
  3. Trigger events on live_A · then live_B

Test Data

  • 2 separate SSE connections

Expected Result

  • WS_A connection receives ONLY live_A events
  • WS_B connection receives ONLY live_B events
  • ไม่มี cross-tenant event leak

▸ TC-4.4-01 Sequential Script Playback IntAC1 P0 SKIP
Sequential Script Playback
Priority: P0 · Level: Int · AC: AC1 · orchestrator

Precondition

  • apply migrations ครบ + Real Postgres test container พร้อม
  • Seed Live (WS_A) มี scene S1 พร้อม 3 scripts: `intro`, `pitch_A`, `cta_close`
  • `live_session_state.scene_cursor = { scene: 0, script_index: 0 }`

Test Steps

  1. Seed Live (WS_A) มี scene S1 พร้อม 3 scripts: `intro`, `pitch_A`, `cta_close`
  2. เริ่ม orchestrator session
  3. Mock engine ส่ง `script_ended` event ตามลำดับ
  4. ตรวจ cursor advance ที่ DB

Test Data

  • Live entity with scene[0].scripts = [intro, pitch_A, cta_close]
  • `live_session_state.scene_cursor = { scene: 0, script_index: 0 }`

Expected Result

  • Orchestrator เริ่มที่ script index 0 (intro)
  • หลัง `script_ended` ของ intro → advance ไป index 1 (pitch_A)
  • หลัง `script_ended` ของ pitch_A → advance ไป index 2 (cta_close)
  • ไม่มี skip · ไม่มี duplicate emission

Actual Result

— บันทึกผลตอนทดสอบ —

Status

PASS FAIL HOLD BLOCKED SKIP
▸ TC-4.4-04 Auto-Switch Scene (FR28c) IntAC2 P0 SKIP
Auto-Switch Scene (FR28c)
Priority: P0 · Level: Int · AC: AC2 · orchestrator

Precondition

  • apply migrations ครบ + Real Postgres test container พร้อม
  • Seed Live with 2 scenes: S1 (3 scripts) · S2 (2 scripts)
  • orchestrator session เริ่มทำงานแล้ว

Test Steps

  1. Seed Live with 2 scenes: S1 (3 scripts) · S2 (2 scripts)
  2. Orchestrator เล่นจน S1 script #2 ส่ง `script_ended`
  3. ตรวจว่า cursor ขยับไป S2 script #0 อัตโนมัติ

Test Data

  • Live with scenes = [{ scripts: [a,b,c] }, { scripts: [d,e] }]

Expected Result

  • State machine: cursor `{ scene: 0, script: 2 }` → `{ scene: 1, script: 0 }`
  • Instant cut (ไม่มี transition delay > 100ms ที่ engine layer)
  • Emit event `scene_switched` → SSE push

▸ TC-4.4-07 Single-Writer p-queue (🔴 BLOCKER) IntAC3 P0 SKIP
Single-Writer p-queue (🔴 BLOCKER)
Priority: P0 · Level: Int · AC: AC3 · orchestrator

Precondition

  • apply migrations ครบ + Real Postgres test container พร้อม
  • Create live session (WS_A) · current cursor = 0
  • p-queue serialize per `live_session_id` พร้อม (ECH #12-14)

Test Steps

  1. Create live session (WS_A)
  2. Fire 2 concurrent `advanceScript` calls ผ่าน `Promise.all`
  3. แต่ละ call พยายาม mutate state (cursor 0 → 1)

Test Data

  • liveSessionId · current cursor = 0

Expected Result

  • Only 1 call succeeds · 1 call gets version conflict error
  • Final cursor = 1 (ไม่ใช่ 2 · ไม่ใช่ 0)
  • p-queue drain ทั้งหมดภายใน 5s
  • No DB constraint violation

Actual Result

— บันทึกผลตอนทดสอบ —

Status

PASS FAIL HOLD BLOCKED SKIP
▸ TC-4.4-08 Per-Live Queue Isolation IntAC3 P0 SKIP
Per-Live Queue Isolation
Priority: P0 · Level: Int · AC: AC3 · orchestrator

Precondition

  • apply migrations ครบ + Real Postgres test container พร้อม
  • Create 2 live sessions: LIVE_X · LIVE_Y (both WS_A)
  • `Map<liveSessionId, PQueue>` พร้อมแยก queue ต่อ live

Test Steps

  1. Create 2 live sessions: LIVE_X · LIVE_Y (both WS_A)
  2. Fire 10 mutations ต่อ LIVE_X · 10 mutations ต่อ LIVE_Y (interleaved · concurrent)
  3. Measure wall time + verify no cross-impact

Test Data

  • 2 separate `live_session_id` values

Expected Result

  • `Map<liveSessionId, PQueue>` แยก queue ต่อ live
  • LIVE_X mutations DO NOT block LIVE_Y
  • Total wall time ≈ max(time_X, time_Y) · NOT sum
  • Each queue serializes its own mutations independently

Actual Result

— บันทึกผลตอนทดสอบ —

Status

PASS FAIL HOLD BLOCKED SKIP
▸ TC-4.4-09 Optimistic Concurrency 409 IntAC3 P0 SKIP
Optimistic Concurrency 409
Priority: P0 · Level: Int · AC: AC3 · orchestrator

Precondition

  • apply migrations ครบ + Real Postgres test container พร้อม
  • Live live_001 with `version_col = 5` (optimistic locking field)
  • มี 2 services (A · B) ที่ read state ได้พร้อมกัน

Test Steps

  1. Live live_001 with `version_col = 5`
  2. Service A reads state (version=5)
  3. Service B reads state (version=5)
  4. Service A writes UPDATE WHERE version=5 → success (version → 6)
  5. Service B writes UPDATE WHERE version=5 → 0 rows (stale)

Test Data

  • Live state with `version_col` field for optimistic locking

Expected Result

  • Service A's write persisted (version=6)
  • Service B receives `ConflictException` (mapped to 409)
  • Service B should retry with fresh read

Actual Result

— บันทึกผลตอนทดสอบ —

Status

PASS FAIL HOLD BLOCKED SKIP
▸ TC-4.4-10 ECS SIGTERM Drain IntAC3 P1 SKIP
ECS SIGTERM Drain
Priority: P1 · Level: Int · AC: AC3 · orchestrator

Precondition

  • apply migrations ครบ + Real Postgres test container พร้อม
  • ECS task running 2 active Lives (`active_live_sessions_per_task` = 2)
  • graceful drain handler พร้อมรับ SIGTERM

Test Steps

  1. ECS task running 2 active Lives (`active_live_sessions_per_task` = 2)
  2. Send SIGTERM signal
  3. Wait for graceful drain

Test Data

  • 2 active live sessions

Expected Result

  • Task refuses new Lives but completes existing
  • Both Lives finish their current scripts gracefully
  • Final state persisted to `live_session_state` before exit
  • No orphan Live state in DB after task exits

▸ TC-4.4-11 Multi-Tenant Orchestrator Isolation (🔴 BLOCKER) IntDoD P0 SKIP
Multi-Tenant Orchestrator Isolation (🔴 BLOCKER)
Priority: P0 · Level: Int · AC: DoD · orchestrator

Precondition

  • apply migrations ครบ + RLS FORCE บน Real Postgres (non-superuser role)
  • Seed: WS_A has live_A (state=Live) · WS_B has live_B (state=Live)
  • Orchestrator service รันใต้ WS_A context (`scopedQuery` + RLS)

Test Steps

  1. Seed: WS_A has live_A (state=Live) · WS_B has live_B (state=Live)
  2. Orchestrator service in WS_A context
  3. Attempt: orchestrator.readState(live_B) + orchestrator.mutateState(live_B)
  4. Use `scopedQuery` + RLS

Test Data

  • 2 workspaces with isolated live states

Expected Result

  • SELECT returns 0 rows (live_B invisible to WS_A context)
  • UPDATE affects 0 rows (RLS deny)
  • ไม่มี exception thrown · graceful empty result
  • Audit log records cross-tenant attempt (if any)

Actual Result

— บันทึกผลตอนทดสอบ —

Status

PASS FAIL HOLD BLOCKED SKIP
▸ TC-4.4-13 Watchdog Force-Flush (ECH #92) IntAC1 P1 SKIP
Watchdog Force-Flush (ECH #92)
Priority: P1 · Level: Int · AC: AC1 · orchestrator

Precondition

  • apply migrations ครบ + Real Postgres test container พร้อม
  • Script "pitch" duration=30s · `script_play_id=PID_3` started
  • Engine จำลองไม่ emit `script_ended` (network blip) · watchdog timer = 30s + 5s buffer

Test Steps

  1. Script "pitch" duration=30s started
  2. Engine fails to emit `script_ended` (simulate network blip)
  3. Watchdog timer = 30s + 5s buffer
  4. Wait 35s

Test Data

  • Script with `duration=30s` · `script_play_id=PID_3`

Expected Result

  • Watchdog force-flush at T=35s
  • Orchestrator advances cursor as if normal completion
  • Log warning `[watchdog-force-flush] script_play_id=PID_3`
  • Live continues without stall

Status

PASS FAIL HOLD BLOCKED SKIP
▸ TC-4.4-14 Workspace-Scoped State Read (🔴 BLOCKER) IntAC3 P0 SKIP
Workspace-Scoped State Read (🔴 BLOCKER)
Priority: P0 · Level: Int · AC: AC3 · orchestrator

Precondition

  • apply migrations ครบ + RLS FORCE บน Real Postgres (non-superuser role)
  • WS_A has live_A (state row exists) · WS_B has live_B
  • orchestrator รันใต้ WS_A context

Test Steps

  1. WS_A has live_A (state row exists) · WS_B has live_B
  2. In WS_A context: orchestrator.readState(live_A) — expect success
  3. In WS_A context: orchestrator.readState(live_B) — expect zero result

Test Data

  • 2 workspaces · 2 live states

Expected Result

  • WS_A reading live_A → returns full state
  • WS_A reading live_B → 0 rows (RLS) · returns null or NotFoundException
  • No state leak across workspace boundary

Concurrent Limit Exceeded → 429
Priority: P0 · Level: API · AC: AC2 · **Endpoint:** POST /live/start · session-cap

Precondition

  • user login เป็น Owner ของ WS_A และมี JWT พร้อมใช้งาน
  • concurrent limit ของ workspace = 2 (NFR-INT-AVATAR-01)
  • มี 2 active sessions ใน WS_A (LIVE_1 + LIVE_2) ทำงานอยู่แล้ว

Test Steps

  1. เริ่ม 2 active sessions ใน WS_A (LIVE_1 + LIVE_2)
  2. ยิง `POST /api/v1/live/start` ครั้งที่ 3 (LIVE_3)
  3. ตรวจ deny

Test Data

  • NFR-INT-AVATAR-01 concurrent limit = 2 per workspace
  • 2 active sessions ทำงานอยู่
  • Owner JWT + WS_A_ID

Expected Result

  • Status: 429 Too Many Requests
  • Body: `{ type: "...concurrent-limit", status: 429 }`
  • LIVE_3 ไม่ถูกสร้าง
  • ไม่มี engine session warmup ถูก trigger

  • `speaking_time` metric emitted ทุก 10s heartbeat (matching 4.9a write-behind)
  • Metric tagged with `live_id` + `workspace_id`
  • Values monotonic increasing

▸ TC-4.5a-07 Per-Workspace Cap Scope IntDoD P0 SKIP
Per-Workspace Cap Scope
Priority: P0 · Level: Int · AC: DoD · session-cap

Precondition

  • apply migrations ครบ + RLS enabled บน Real Postgres
  • มี 2 workspaces WS_A / WS_B (multi-tenant fixture)
  • concurrent limit = 2 per workspace (NFR-INT-AVATAR-01)

Test Steps

  1. WS_A starts 2 concurrent sessions (within limit)
  2. WS_B starts 2 concurrent sessions (within limit)
  3. Both workspace ใช้ engine session อิสระ

Test Data

  • NFR-INT-AVATAR-01 concurrent limit = 2 per workspace

Expected Result

  • WS_A's count = 2 · WS_B's count = 2 (independent)
  • WS_A 3rd session blocked · WS_B still at 2 (not affected)
  • No cross-tenant counting

Precondition

  • WS_A creates Live + persists state · WS_B มี state ของตัวเอง
  • สามารถ `SET app.current_workspace_id` ได้

Test Steps

  2. Set RLS context: `SET app.current_workspace_id = '<WS_B_ID>'`
  3. Query `SELECT FROM live_session_state WHERE live_id = '<WS_A_live>'`
  4. Use non-superuser DB role

Test Data

  • WS_A · WS_B · 2 live states

Expected Result

  • Query returns 0 rows (RLS deny under WS_B context)
  • No exception · graceful empty
  • Confirmed via direct SQL test (not just API layer)

▸ TC-4.3-05 Token Refresh APIAC2 · **Endpoint:** POST /live/broadcast-url/refresh P1 SKIP
Token Refresh
Priority: P1 · Level: API · AC: AC2 · **Endpoint:** POST /live/broadcast-url/refresh · webrtc-render

Precondition

  • user login เป็น Owner ของ WS_A และมี JWT พร้อมใช้งาน
  • Live broadcasting อยู่ · token current ใกล้จะ expire (TTL < 300s)

Test Steps

  1. Live broadcasting · token current ใกล้จะ expire
  2. ยิง `POST /api/v1/live/broadcast-url/refresh` พร้อม liveId
  3. ตรวจ new token + TTL

Test Data

  • Owner JWT + WS_A_ID
  • Body: `{ liveId }`
  • Existing token TTL < 300s (refresh window)

Expected Result

  • Status: 200
  • Body: `{ broadcastUrl, token: <NEW>, ttl: 7200 }`
  • New token signature ต่างจากเดิม
  • Old token revoked (later request with old token → 401)

▸ TC-4.3-06 Invalid Token Signature → 401 APIAC2 · **Endpoint:** GET /broadcast/{token} P0 SKIP
Invalid Token Signature → 401
Priority: P0 · Level: API · AC: AC2 · **Endpoint:** GET /broadcast/{token} · webrtc-render

Precondition

  • broadcast endpoint พร้อมรับ request (ไม่ต้องมี session valid)
  • มี token string ที่ signature ผิด (ไม่ผ่าน JWT verify)

Test Steps

  1. ยิง `GET /api/v1/broadcast/INVALID_SIGNATURE_TOKEN` (token signature ผิด)
  2. ตรวจ response

Test Data

  • URL path token = `INVALID_SIGNATURE_TOKEN` (string ที่ไม่ผ่าน JWT verify)

Expected Result

  • Status: 401
  • Content-Type: `application/problem+json`
  • Body `type` มี "invalid-token"
  • ไม่มี side effect (no engine call)
  • Audit log บันทึก invalid attempt

▸ TC-4.3-01 Real WebRTC Render Works E2EAC1 P0 SKIP
Real WebRTC Render Works
Priority: P0 · Level: E2E · AC: AC1 · webrtc-render

Precondition

  • Real Engine sandbox session available (warmup ≤60s)
  • WebRTC test environment พร้อม + 2 browser contexts (Owner + Display Device)
  • DB Seed: Create Live with avatar=A1, voice=V1, 3 scripts
  • user = Owner + login สำเร็จ

Test Steps

  1. [DB Seed] Create Live with avatar=A1, voice=V1, 3 scripts
  2. [Engine] Real Engine sandbox warmup (≤60s)
  3. [Browser] Owner login + navigate /live/console/{id}
  4. [Browser] Click Start → API returns broadcast_url
  5. [Browser] Open broadcast_url in new context (Display Device page)
  6. [Engine] Real Engine streams Avatar via WebRTC
  7. [Browser] ASSERT: `<video>` receives stream (videoWidth > 0 within 10s)
  8. [Browser] ASSERT: avatar visible (screenshot diff > 5% from black baseline)
  9. [Browser] ASSERT: audio track active (audioContext analyser RMS > 0)
  10. [Cleanup] Stop Live + delete state

Test Data

  • Live with avatar=A1, voice=V1, 3 scripts
  • Real Engine sandbox session available
  • Duration: ~30s

Expected Result

  • `<video>` receives stream (videoWidth > 0 within 10s)
  • avatar visible (screenshot diff > 5% from black baseline)
  • audio track active (audioContext analyser RMS > 0)

Actual Result

— บันทึกผลตอนทดสอบ —

Status

PASS FAIL HOLD BLOCKED SKIP
▸ TC-4.3-03 Token TTL 7200s Soak (Weekly) E2EAC1 P1 SKIP
Token TTL 7200s Soak (Weekly)
Priority: P1 · Level: E2E · AC: AC1 · webrtc-render

Precondition

  • Soak segment พร้อมรัน (weekly only · NOT nightly)
  • Real Engine sandbox + DB seed เดียวกับ TC-4.3-01
  • สามารถเปิด broadcast_url ค้างไว้ต่อเนื่อง 7200s ได้

Test Steps

  1. [DB Seed] Same setup as TC-4.3-01
  2. [Browser] Open broadcast_url at T=0
  3. [Soak] Keep page open continuously for 7200s (2 hours)
  4. [Time] T=0~7000s: stream stable (no token refresh needed)
  5. [Time] T=7000s (200s before TTL): system may pre-refresh (MVP-2 feature · MVP-1 may not)
  6. [Time] T=7200s exact: if no refresh → 401 error → TC-4.3-04 recover flow
  7. [Cleanup] Stop Live + drain engine

Test Data

  • Same Live setup as TC-4.3-01
  • Token TTL = 7200s
  • Duration: ~2 hours (weekly soak)

Expected Result

  • T=0~7000s: stream stable (no token refresh needed)
  • T=7000s: system may pre-refresh (MVP-2 · MVP-1 may not)
  • T=7200s exact: ถ้าไม่ refresh → 401 → ส่งต่อ recover flow (TC-4.3-04)

Actual Result

— บันทึกผลตอนทดสอบ —

Status

PASS FAIL HOLD BLOCKED SKIP
▸ TC-4.3-10 Engine Session Disconnect → Manual Recovery E2EAC2 P1 SKIP
Engine Session Disconnect → Manual Recovery
Priority: P1 · Level: E2E · AC: AC2 · webrtc-render

Precondition

  • Engine sandbox supports manual session kill (drop session at T=15s)
  • Real Engine + backend disconnect detection พร้อม (within 5s · NFR-REL-03)
  • DB Seed: Create Live + start broadcasting · Owner console เปิดอยู่

Test Steps

  1. [DB Seed] Create Live + start broadcasting
  2. [Engine] Engine sandbox configured to drop session at T=15s
  3. [Time] At T=15s: engine session terminates (simulate crash)
  4. [Engine] WebRTC track ends (track.readyState='ended')
  5. [Backend] TAKRA backend detects engine disconnect (within 5s · NFR-REL-03)
  6. [SSE] alert.high pushed to Owner console
  7. [Backend] Health check fails → block automatic restart
  8. [Browser] ASSERT: Owner sees error overlay with "Restart" button
  9. [Browser] Owner clicks "Restart" → new engine session + new broadcast_url
  10. [Cleanup] Stop Live + cleanup

Test Data

  • Engine sandbox supports manual session kill
  • Disconnect at T=15s
  • Duration: ~45s

Expected Result

  • Backend detects engine disconnect within 5s (NFR-REL-03)
  • alert.high pushed to Owner console
  • Health check fails → block automatic restart
  • Owner sees error overlay with "Restart" button
  • Owner clicks "Restart" → new engine session + new broadcast_url
  • Closes gap — engine-level disconnect ≠ token expiry (TC-4.3-04)
  • ---
  • > **Total:** 3 Full-Loop TCs (P0×1 · P1×2) · scripts: `render-webrtc-4-3-full.smoke.mjs` · `render-engine-disconnect-4-3-10-full.smoke.mjs`

ICE connection failure (firewall)
Priority: P0 · Level: E2E · AC: AC1 · **Type:** Fault (Network) · webrtc-render

Precondition

  • Firewall blocks WebRTC ports

Test Steps

  1. Open broadcast_url with firewall blocking

Test Data

  • ICE failure

📁 comment-pipeline 🔄 13 · 13 TCs
▸ TC-5.E2E-01 Safe comment full pipeline E2ENFR-002a P0 SKIP
Safe comment full pipeline
Priority: P0 · Level: E2E · AC: NFR-002a · comment-pipeline

Precondition

  • stack จริงรันอยู่ (Backend + Postgres + SSE gateway) + Prism Insight mock
  • WS_A session started · catalog/voice seeded
  • browser พร้อมเปิด Control Room

Test Steps

  1. ```
  2. [DB Seed] 1. start session in WS_A · seed catalog/voice
  3. [Prism] 2. Inject 1 safe comment "ราคาเท่าไหร่" via Insight mock
  4. [Browser] 3. Open /live/session/[id] (Control Room)
  5. [Browser] 4. Open SSE stream
  6. [Backend] 5. Insight client polls → comment fetched
  7. [Backend] 6. Risk filter check → verdict=pass
  8. [Backend] 7. Reply Burst orchestrator queues comment
  9. [Backend] 8. After 1.5s settle → burst dispatched (1 comment)
  10. [Backend] 9. Avatar engine called with audio reply
  11. [SSE] 10. reply.spoken event pushed to client
  12. [Browser] 11. ASSERT: feed item shows comment + intent badge "Price"
  13. [Browser] 12. ASSERT: transcript panel shows reply text
  14. [Browser] 13. ASSERT: stat tile commentCount = 1, replyCount = 1
  15. [Assert] 14. E2E latency comment-ingested → reply-spoken ≤ 30s (NFR-002a)
  16. [Cleanup] 15. End session · delete seed data
  17. ```

Test Data

  • safe comment text = "ราคาเท่าไหร่" (intent Price) · WS_A catalog/voice seeded

Expected Result

  • feed item shows comment + intent badge "Price"
  • transcript panel shows reply text · stat tile commentCount = 1, replyCount = 1
  • E2E latency comment-ingested → reply-spoken ≤ 30s (NFR-002a)

Actual Result

SSE disconnect → Last-Event-ID resume
Priority: P0 · Level: E2E · AC: NFR-REL-LIVE-01 · comment-pipeline

Precondition

  • stack จริงรันอยู่ + SSE gateway with ring buffer
  • WS_A session started
  • browser เปิด Control Room + SSE connected ถึง event_id=10

Test Steps

  1. ```
  2. [DB Seed] 1. start session in WS_A
  3. [Browser] 2. Open /live/session/[id]
  4. [SSE] 3. Connect SSE · receive events to event_id=10
  5. [Browser] 4. Force disconnect (network offline simulation)
  6. [Backend] 5. During disconnect: inject 20 more events (id 11-30) into ring buffer
  7. [Browser] 6. Wait 60s
  8. [Browser] 7. Restore network
  9. [Browser] 8. EventSource auto-reconnects with Last-Event-ID: 10
  10. [Backend] 9. SSE gateway replays events 11-30 from ring buffer
  11. [Browser] 10. ASSERT: client receives events 11 through 30 (no gap)
  12. [Browser] 11. ASSERT: stat tiles eventually consistent with backend state
  13. [Cleanup] 12. End session
  14. ```

Test Data

  • ring buffer big enough · 20 events injected during 60s gap (id 11-30)

Expected Result

  • client receives events 11 through 30 (no gap)
  • stat tiles eventually consistent with backend state

Actual Result

Atomic burst no interrupt
Priority: P0 · Level: E2E · AC: ECH#4-10 · comment-pipeline

Precondition

  • stack จริงรันอยู่ + mock engine with controllable timing
  • WS_A session started
  • Prism mock พร้อม inject comments ตาม timeline

Test Steps

  1. ```
  2. [DB Seed] 1. start session · mock engine with controllable timing
  3. [Prism] 2. Inject 3 comments (burst #1 candidates)
  4. [Backend] 3. After 1.5s settle → burst #1 dispatched · engine starts speaking (~5s)
  5. [Prism] 4. At engine t+2s · inject 3 more comments (burst #2 candidates)
  6. [Backend] 5. After 1.5s settle on burst #2 → orchestrator attempts dispatch
  7. [Assert] 6. burst #2 dispatched QUEUED (waits for #1)
  8. [Assert] 7. engine NOT interrupted mid-script (engine.interrupt() NOT called)
  9. [Backend] 8. burst #1 completes (~5s)
  10. [Backend] 9. burst #2 starts immediately after
  11. [Browser] 10. ASSERT: SSE shows reply.spoken event for burst #1 first, then #2
  12. [Assert] 11. No audio overlap · no mid-script cut event
  13. [Cleanup] 12. End session
  14. ```

Test Data

  • burst #1 candidates (3 comments) · burst #2 candidates (3 comments at engine t+2s) · controllable engine timing

Expected Result

  • burst #2 dispatched QUEUED (waits for #1) · engine NOT interrupted mid-script
  • SSE shows reply.spoken for burst #1 first, then #2 · no audio overlap · no mid-script cut
  • ---

Actual Result

📁 ai-script-gen 🔌 4 🔗 10 🌐 4 🔄 1 · 19 TCs
▸ TC-6.1-01 Valid product context → 200 + 8-type structured script APIAC1 · **Endpoint:** POST /scripts/generate P0 SKIP
Valid product context → 200 + 8-type structured script
Priority: P0 · Level: API · AC: AC1 · **Endpoint:** POST /scripts/generate · ai-script-gen

Precondition

  • มี user เป็น member (owner) ของ WS_A + token พร้อมใช้
  • มี product อยู่ใน WS_A (productId valid)
  • LLM mock ตั้งเป็น stub deterministic response (8-section)
  • workspace มี credit เพียงพอ

Test Steps

  1. ยิง `POST /scripts/generate` พร้อม `{ productId, tone, audience, language }`
  2. ตรวจ response status + body shape

Test Data

  • `Authorization: Bearer ${ownerToken}` · `X-Acting-Workspace: WS_A_ID`
  • payload `{ productId: <WS_A product>, tone: 'friendly', language: 'th' }`
  • LLM mock = stub deterministic response

Expected Result

  • `200` + body มี 8 keys: `hook, intro, pitch, demo, qna, objection, cta, outro`
  • แต่ละ key เป็น array ของ Content (default count = 3)

Actual Result

— บันทึกผลตอนทดสอบ —

Priority: P0 · Level: API · AC: AC6 · **Endpoint:** POST /scripts/generate · ai-script-gen

▸ TC-6.1-FL-01 Owner generates script → real LLM → DB persist → UI 8-section E2EAC1+AC2 P1 SKIP
Owner generates script → real LLM → DB persist → UI 8-section
Priority: P1 · Level: E2E · AC: AC1+AC2 · ai-script-gen

Precondition

  • stack จริงรันอยู่ (Browser + Backend + Real Postgres + LLM sandbox)
  • มี user = Owner ของ WS_A + login session พร้อม
  • LLM sandbox quota เพียงพอ (rate-limited account)
  • DB seed/cleanup helpers พร้อมใช้

Test Steps

  1. ```
  2. [DB Seed] 1. INSERT product P (WS_A) with enriched context (benefits/claims/audience)
  3. [DB Seed] 2. Seed workspace credit balance = 100 (enough for gen)
  4. [Browser] 3. Login as Owner of WS_A
  5. [Browser] 4. Navigate /scripts/editor?productId=P
  6. [Browser] 5. Select tone=friendly · audience defaults · contentsPerSlot=3
  7. [Browser] 6. Click "สร้างสคริปต์ AI"
  8. [API call] 7. POST /scripts/generate → 200 (real LLM sandbox · ~10-20s)
  9. [DB verify] 8. SELECT FROM script_drafts WHERE workspace_id=WS_A → 1 new row
  10. [DB verify] 9. Credit balance = 100 - N (deducted)
  11. [Browser] 10. ASSERT: 8 sections rendered in UI (hook/intro/pitch/demo/qna/objection/cta/outro)
  12. [Browser] 11. ASSERT: each section has 3 Content variants
  13. [Cleanup] 12. Delete script + restore credit
  14. ```

Test Data

  • WS_A · product P with enriched context · credit balance = 100
  • tone=friendly · audience defaults · contentsPerSlot=3

Expected Result

  • `POST /scripts/generate` → 200 (real LLM sandbox)
  • script_drafts มี 1 new row ใน WS_A · credit = 100 - N
  • UI render 8 sections ครบ · แต่ละ section มี 3 Content variants
  • ---

▸ TC-6.1-MT 🔴 Multi-tenant prompt isolation (BLOCKER) IntAC6 P0 SKIP
🔴 Multi-tenant prompt isolation (BLOCKER)
Priority: P0 · Level: Int · AC: AC6 · ai-script-gen

Precondition

  • apply migrations ครบ · WS_A / WS_B fixture พร้อม (2-workspace)
  • WS_A มี secret context "A_SECRET_BRAND" + custom risk word seed ไว้
  • user เป็น member ของ WS_B เท่านั้น
  • LLM mock spy ดักทุก prompt · เชื่อม DB ด้วย non-superuser role

Test Steps

  1. WS_A มี secret context "A_SECRET_BRAND" + custom risk word
  2. WS_B ยิง gen prompt · scan LLM call payload + response
  3. ทดสอบ 4 scenarios:
  4. F.1 Bob (WS_B) → no A_SECRET_BRAND ใน prompt context
  5. F.2 LLM cache key ไม่ collide ข้าม workspace (workspaceId in key)
  6. F.3 LLM response ของ WS_B ไม่มีคำที่ leak จาก WS_A
  7. F.4 Direct DB non-superuser SELECT script_drafts WHERE workspace_id ผิด → 0 rows

Test Data

  • WS_A / WS_B fixture · LLM mock spy ทุก prompt
  • user เป็น member ของ WS_B เท่านั้น
  • Non-superuser DB role

Expected Result

  • ทั้ง 4 scenarios pass (zero leak)
  • cache key includes workspaceId (verified)
  • scopedQuery + RLS + WorkspaceScopeGuard ทำงานทั้ง 3 layer
  • Audit log บันทึก isolation events
  • > 🔴 **BLOCKER** — Story 6.1 cannot close without TC-6.1-MT passing

Actual Result

— บันทึกผลตอนทดสอบ —

Status

PASS FAIL HOLD BLOCKED SKIP

▸ TC-6.4-FL-01 Generate Hook block → drag-drop into slot → DB persist → preview update E2EAC2 P1 SKIP
Generate Hook block → drag-drop into slot → DB persist → preview update
Priority: P1 · Level: E2E · AC: AC2 · building-blocks

Precondition

  • stack จริงรันอยู่ (Browser + Backend + Real Postgres + LLM sandbox)
  • มี user เป็น member ของ WS_A + login session พร้อม
  • มี product P + draft script S (WS_A) ที่ slot Hook ว่าง
  • LLM sandbox quota เพียงพอ
  • DB seed/cleanup helpers พร้อมใช้

Test Steps

  1. ```
  2. [DB Seed] 1. INSERT product P + draft script S (WS_A) with empty Hook slot
  3. [Browser] 2. Login + navigate /scripts/editor/{S}
  4. [Browser] 3. Open building-block palette
  5. [Browser] 4. Click "สร้าง Hook" → 3 variants modal
  6. [API call] 5. POST /scripts/building-blocks/hook/generate → 200 (LLM sandbox)
  7. [Browser] 6. Click "ใช้ตัวนี้" บน variant 1
  8. [API call] 7. POST /scripts/{S}/insert-block { type: 'hook', slot: 'hook', content: '...' } → 200
  9. [DB verify] 8. SELECT FROM script_slots WHERE script_id=S AND slot='hook' → content updated
  10. [Browser] 9. Modal closes
  11. [Browser] 10. ASSERT: Hook slot ของ script preview แสดง variant 1 text
  12. [Cleanup] 11. Delete script
  13. ```

Test Data

  • WS_A · product P · draft script S with empty Hook slot
  • selected variant 1 จาก 3 hook variants

Expected Result

  • `POST /scripts/building-blocks/hook/generate` → 200 (3 variants · LLM sandbox)
  • `POST /scripts/{S}/insert-block` → 200 · script_slots slot='hook' content updated ใน DB
  • modal closes · Hook slot preview แสดง variant 1 text
  • ---
  • > **รวม 1 Full-Loop TC** (P1×1) · script: `apps/web/tests/smoke/full-stack/building-block-6-4-full.smoke.mjs`
  • > **Trace:** [README](README.md) · [api](api.md) · [integration](integration.md) · [ui](ui.md) · [epic-6 source](../../../epic-6/mvp1-epic-6-02d-test-cases-fullloop-e2e.md)

  • contentsPerSlot guard = range 1-5

  • `Authorization: Bearer ${ownerToken}` · `X-Acting-Workspace: WS_A_ID`

Expected Result

  • `200` + แต่ละ slot มี Contents 5 รายการ
  • credit deduction ~1.5-2× single-content (verified separately TC-6.3-05)

▸ TC-6.3-FL-01 Gen 3 contents · 1 risk word → UI flag เฉพาะ content นั้น · approval gate block E2EAC3 P1 SKIP
Gen 3 contents · 1 risk word → UI flag เฉพาะ content นั้น · approval gate block
Priority: P1 · Level: E2E · AC: AC3 · multi-content

Precondition

  • stack จริงรันอยู่ (Browser + Backend + Real Postgres + LLM sandbox)
  • มี user เป็น member ของ WS_A + login session พร้อม
  • risk word library (cross 3.8b) มีคำ "รักษามะเร็ง"
  • LLM stub override ได้ให้ content 2 มี risk word
  • DB seed/cleanup helpers พร้อมใช้

Test Steps

  1. ```
  2. [DB Seed] 1. INSERT product P (WS_A) + risk word library with "รักษามะเร็ง"
  3. [DB Seed] 2. Override LLM stub to return: content 0=clean, content 1=clean, content 2="...รักษามะเร็ง..."
  4. [Browser] 3. Login + navigate /scripts/editor
  5. [Browser] 4. Click "สร้าง 3 contents/slot"
  6. [API call] 5. POST /scripts/generate → 200
  7. [API call] 6. POST /scripts/{id}/risk-check (cross 3.8b) → 1 of 3 flagged
  8. [DB verify] 7. SELECT script_contents WHERE flagged=true → 1 row (content index 2)
  9. [Browser] 8. ASSERT: content 0/1 = ✅ clean badge
  10. [Browser] 9. ASSERT: content 2 = 🚨 risk flag + "รักษามะเร็ง" highlight
  11. [Browser] 10. ASSERT: approval button DISABLED (กดไม่ได้จนกว่าจะ resolve)
  12. [Browser] 11. Edit content 2 → ลบคำเสี่ยง → re-check
  13. [Browser] 12. ASSERT: approval button ENABLED
  14. [Cleanup] 13. Delete script
  15. ```

Test Data

  • WS_A · product P + risk word library "รักษามะเร็ง"
  • LLM stub: content 0=clean · content 1=clean · content 2="...รักษามะเร็ง..."

Expected Result

  • risk-check flag เฉพาะ content index 2 (1 row flagged=true ใน DB)
  • UI: content 0/1 = clean badge · content 2 = risk flag + highlight
  • approval button DISABLED ก่อน resolve · ENABLED หลังลบคำเสี่ยง + re-check
  • ---
  • > **รวม 1 Full-Loop TC** (P1×1) · script: `apps/web/tests/smoke/full-stack/script-risk-check-6-3-full.smoke.mjs`
  • > **Trace:** [README](README.md) · [api](api.md) · [integration](integration.md) · [ui](ui.md) · [epic-6 source](../../../epic-6/mvp1-epic-6-02d-test-cases-fullloop-e2e.md)
  • ---
  • > **เพิ่มเติม:** เคสที่ทดสอบ full-loop multi-content edge cases

Actual Result

— บันทึกผลตอนทดสอบ —

  • Script generated successfully
  • Network dropped during risk-check call

Test Steps

  1. Generate contents → success
  2. Trigger risk-check
  3. Network disconnect mid-call

Test Data

  • network failure simulation

Expected Result

  • UI shows "risk-check failed" banner
  • Retry button available
  • Content status = "pending_check" (not falsely clean)
  • Approval gate BLOCKED until re-check succeeds

🚀 Epic 7 — Production Readiness & Pilot Launch (76 TCs · 6 features)
📁 ci-tier2 🔄 6 · 6 TCs
▸ TC-7.1-01 Full Pilot path: login → catalog → studio → broadcast → comment · all green E2EAR-12 P0 SKIP
Full Pilot path: login → catalog → studio → broadcast → comment · all green
Priority: P0 · Level: E2E · AC: AR-12 · ci-tier2

Precondition

  • staging stack จริงรันอยู่ (real Zitadel staging · Avatar Engine sandbox · Insight sandbox · CloudWatch)
  • DB seed: staging WS + 5 avatars + 5 voices + 3 products + risk words พร้อม
  • pilot Owner credential ใช้ได้

Test Steps

  1. [DB Seed] Provision staging WS + 5 avatars + 5 voices + 3 products + risk words
  2. [Browser] Login as pilot Owner (real Zitadel staging)
  3. [Browser] Navigate /catalog → verify 3 products visible
  4. [Browser] Click "New Live" → Wizard Step 1 (Avatar) → Step 2 (Voice) → Step 3 (Script)
  5. [Browser] Run risk-word check → approval gate → Launch
  6. [Engine] POST /sessions/launch → Real Avatar Engine sandbox returns render URL
  7. [Browser] Broadcast page loads · device setup completes · health green
  8. [Insight] Mock comment in Insight sandbox → comment appears in Live Console
  9. [Browser] Operator replies → reply rendered + handover gap measured
  10. [Verify] CloudWatch metrics published · alarm OK
  11. [Cleanup] End session · delete seed data

Test Data

  • seed: staging WS + 5 avatars + 5 voices + 3 products + risk words
  • pilot Owner (real Zitadel staging)

Expected Result

  • ทุก step green: login → catalog → studio → broadcast → comment → reply
  • Real Avatar Engine sandbox returns render URL · health green
  • CloudWatch metrics published · alarm OK · cleanup ครบ

Actual Result

— บันทึกผลตอนทดสอบ —

Status

PASS FAIL HOLD BLOCKED SKIP

▸ TC-7.5-01 DR drill executes successfully — restore last snapshot into staging RDS E2ENFR-DATA-01 P0 SKIP
DR drill executes successfully — restore last snapshot into staging RDS
Priority: P0 · Level: E2E · AC: NFR-DATA-01 · dr-restore

Precondition

  • มี automated snapshot ล่าสุด < 24h (RPO ok)
  • ops มีสิทธิ์ AWS CLI restore + access `runbooks/dr-restore-drill.md`

Test Steps

  1. Verify last automated snapshot < 24h old (RPO ok)
  2. aws rds restore-db-instance-from-db-snapshot --target=staging-restore
  3. Restore completes (typical ~10 min staging)
  4. Connect to restored instance · run sanity SQL (SELECT count from key tables)
  5. ตรวจ Schema version = latest committed migration
  6. Data integrity: spot-check 5 known records
  7. Delete staging-restore instance · log drill outcome to runbook
  8. Append to `runbooks/dr-restore-drill.md` log table

Test Data

  • last automated snapshot (< 24h)
  • spot-check: 5 known records

Expected Result

  • restored instance ใช้งานได้ · sanity SQL ผ่าน
  • Schema version = latest committed migration
  • spot-check 5 records ตรง · drill outcome logged ใน runbook

Priority: P0 · Level: E2E · AC: ECH#39 · dr-restore

Precondition

  • มี revoke request จาก Story 1.12 DSAR (user U1 revoked voice consent)
  • มี snapshot ที่มี U1 data + ops access `runbooks/pdpa-snapshot-purge.md`

  2. List all snapshots that contain U1 data (created after U1 first record)
  3. Mark each snapshot with tombstone tag `pdpa-purge-{user_id}-{ts}`
  4. Schedule snapshot deletion via aws rds delete-db-snapshot
  5. After deletion: snapshot list shows tombstoned + deleted
  6. Audit log row: `{ action: 'pdpa.snapshot_purge', user_id: U1, snapshots_purged: [...], evidence: 'runbook-link' }`
  7. Story 1.12 DSAR ticket attaches this audit row as evidence

Test Data

  • user U1 revoke request (Story 1.12 DSAR)
  • tombstone tag: `pdpa-purge-{user_id}-{ts}`

Expected Result

  • snapshot list แสดง tombstoned + deleted
  • audit log row ครบ `{ action: 'pdpa.snapshot_purge', user_id, snapshots_purged, evidence }`
  • DSAR ticket attach audit row as evidence

▸ TC-7.6-API-02 Toggle Insight degraded-mode flag → audit-logged APIAC3 · **Endpoint:** PATCH /admin/feature-flags P0 SKIP
Toggle Insight degraded-mode flag → audit-logged
Priority: P0 · Level: API · AC: AC3 · **Endpoint:** PATCH /admin/feature-flags · pilot-provisioning

Precondition

  • มี Ops admin role JWT fixture (admin scope)
  • feature flag `insight.degradedMode` มีอยู่ใน config + audit_log table พร้อม

Test Steps

  1. ยิง `PATCH /admin/feature-flags` set `insight.degradedMode=true`
  2. ยิง `GET /admin/feature-flags` ตรวจสถานะ
  3. ยิง `PATCH` set `false` · ตรวจ audit_log

Test Data

  • `Authorization: Bearer ${opsToken}` · admin scope
  • payload `{ key: "insight.degradedMode", value: true, reason: "Insight contract pending" }`

Expected Result

  • `200` ทั้ง 2 PATCH · `200` GET คืน current value
  • audit_log มี 2 rows (toggle on + off) · พร้อม `reason` field
  • flag default = `true` จน Insight contract signed
  • ```typescript
  • // TC-7.6-API-02: Toggle Insight degraded-mode flag with audit
  • it('TC-7.6-API-02: PATCH /admin/feature-flags audits toggle', async () => {
  • const res = await request(app.getHttpServer())
  • .patch('/admin/feature-flags')
  • .set('Authorization', `Bearer ${opsToken}`)
  • .send({ key: 'insight.degradedMode', value: true, reason: 'contract pending' });
  • expect(res.status).toBe(200);
  • const auditRows = await db.query(
  • `SELECT * FROM audit_log WHERE action='feature_flag.update' ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1`,
  • );
  • expect(auditRows[0]).toMatchObject({
  • actor_user_id: opsUserId,
  • target_key: 'insight.degradedMode',
  • new_value: 'true',
  • reason: 'contract pending',
  • });
  • });
  • ```

Validation Gate: 0 ban-rate — 30-day pilot · 0 tenant banned
Priority: P0 · Level: E2E · AC: VG (Validation Gate) · pilot-provisioning

Precondition

  • Pilot tenants live ใน production · 30-day window เริ่มแล้ว
  • admin query สำหรับ `tenant.banned` พร้อมใช้

Test Steps

  1. Pilot tenants in production · 30-day window starts
  2. Monitor `tenant.banned=true` count via admin query (daily)
  3. At day 30: `SELECT count(*) FROM workspaces WHERE banned=true AND created_at > T-30d` = 0
  4. ตัดสิน: If 0 → ✅ Gate pass · if >0 → 🔴 NO-GO · rollback + retro

Test Data

  • 30-day pilot window
  • query: banned workspaces created in window

Expected Result

  • At day 30: banned count = 0 → ✅ Gate pass
  • ถ้า >0 → 🔴 NO-GO · rollback + retro

  • `risk_filter_stats` table aggregate ได้ (daily)

Test Steps

  1. Pilot live · risk filter active
  2. Aggregate from `risk_filter_stats` table (daily)
  3. block_rate = blocked_count / (blocked + filtered + missed)
  4. At day 30: block_rate ≥ 95% (NFR-SEC-08)
  5. ตัดสิน: If ≥95% → ✅ · if <95% → 🔴 NO-GO · retune E5 + retro

Test Data

  • `risk_filter_stats` aggregate over 30-day pilot
  • threshold: ≥95% (NFR-SEC-08)

Expected Result

▸ TC-7.6-11 Validation Gate: NPS ≥30 — exit survey from 1-3 paying pilot tenants E2EVG (Validation Gate) P0 SKIP
Validation Gate: NPS ≥30 — exit survey from 1-3 paying pilot tenants
Priority: P0 · Level: E2E · AC: VG (Validation Gate) · pilot-provisioning

Precondition

  • pilot ครบ 30 วัน · NPS exit survey tool พร้อมส่ง
  • มี 1-3 paying tenant + ทีมให้ตอบ survey

Test Steps

  1. NPS exit survey sent to all pilot Owners at day 30
  2. Collect responses (target: 1-3 paying tenant + their team)
  3. NPS = % promoters (9-10) - % detractors (0-6)
  4. ตรวจ NPS ≥ 30
  5. ตัดสิน: If ≥30 → ✅ · if 0-29 → 🟡 GO with caveat (PM decide) · if <0 → 🔴 NO-GO
  6. Pair with bmad-retrospective for full epic retro post-launch

Test Data

  • NPS exit survey (1-3 paying tenant + team)
  • threshold: NPS ≥ 30

Expected Result

  • NPS ≥ 30 → ✅
  • 0-29 → 🟡 GO with caveat (PM decide) · <0 → 🔴 NO-GO
  • pair กับ bmad-retrospective post-launch

Priority: P1 · Level: API · AC: NFR-006 · **Endpoint:** GET /health/live · prod-deploy

  • API service รันอยู่ (ECS task healthy)

  1. ยิง `GET /health/live` โดยไม่ต้อง auth
  2. วัด response time + status code

  • ไม่ต้องมี `Authorization` header (probe = unauth)
  • ไม่ต้อง workspace context

Expected Result

  • `200 OK`
  • response time < 100ms (sub-100ms · ECS health-check budget)
  • body มี `{ status: "ok", uptime: <number> }`

▸ TC-7.3-API-02 Readiness probe ตรวจ deps ครบ → 200/503 APINFR-006 · **Endpoint:** GET /health/ready P0 SKIP
Readiness probe ตรวจ deps ครบ → 200/503
Priority: P0 · Level: API · AC: NFR-006 · **Endpoint:** GET /health/ready · prod-deploy

Precondition

  • API service รันอยู่
  • deps (DB · Redis · S3) เชื่อมต่อได้ปกติในสถานะเริ่มต้น

Test Steps

  1. ยิง `GET /health/ready` ในสถานะ deps healthy → คาด 200
  2. ตัด DB connection (mock fail) → ยิงซ้ำ → คาด 503
  3. restore DB → ยิงซ้ำ → คาด 200

Test Data

  • ไม่ต้อง auth · probe เอง
  • deps = `{ db, redis, s3 }`

Expected Result

  • healthy: `200` + body `{ status: "ready", deps: { db: true, redis: true, s3: true } }`
  • DB down: `503` + body `{ status: "not-ready", deps: { db: false, redis: true, s3: true } }`
  • กลับมา healthy: `200`

Priority: P0 · Level: E2E · AC: NFR-006 · prod-deploy

  • task definition v2 (previous) · v3 (current)
  • rollback budget: ≤5 min (NFR-006)

Expected Result

  • v2 re-active ภายใน 5 min (NFR-006 budget)
  • health check pass บน v2 · no data loss

Priority: P0 · Level: Int · AC: ECH#66 · prod-deploy

Precondition

  • LocalStack ECS event sim พร้อมใช้งาน
  • start 2 ECS task: task A มี 1 active Live session · task B = idle

Test Steps

  • task B: `active_live_sessions=0`

Expected Result

  • ECS terminate task B (idle) เท่านั้น
  • task A (มี active Live) **ไม่ถูก terminate** · guard ป้องกัน
  • ถ้า ทั้ง 2 task มี active session → scale-in **ถูก reject ทั้งหมด** · log warning

SIGTERM drain · stopTimeout=600s
Priority: P0 · Level: Int · AC: ECH#66 · prod-deploy

Precondition

  • task definition ตั้ง stopTimeout = 600s
  • task ที่มี 3 long-lived connections (Live broadcast SSE) รันอยู่

  • stopTimeout = 600s (จาก ECS task definition)
  • SIGTERM ส่งที่ t=0

Expected Result

  • task หยุดรับ new connection ทันทีหลัง SIGTERM (drain mode)
  • existing 3 connections completes graceful (ไม่ถูก kill ก่อน 600s)
  • ถ้า connection ยังไม่จบที่ 600s → SIGKILL · log warning ตาม ECH#66
